---
title: "ACE Disparity Brief rundown"
author: "Caleb"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 90
---

## The idea 

```{R}


ord_rel <- readRDS("../Data/cluster/discrete//ord/ord_rel_001.rds")
# ord_sample <- readRDS("../Data/cluster/discrete/ord/ord_sample_001.rds")
# ord_strict <- readRDS("../Data/cluster/discrete/ord/ord_strict_001.rds")
# ord_no_ace <- readRDS("../Data/cluster/discrete/ord/ord_no_ace_001.rds")
ord_true <- readRDS("../Data/cluster/discrete/ord/ord_true_001.rds")


rel_all <- ord_rel$fast$all
ord_all <- ord_true$fast

dispRity(rel_all, metric = c(sum, variances))$disparity

    c1  c2  c3  c4
t1  0   1   0   1
t2  1   1   1   1
n1  0   0/1 0/1 1
n2  0/1 0/1 0   0/1


par(mfrow = c(1,2))

plot(rel_all)
plot(ord_all)





# Generate a taxa x traits matrix with many "0/1" ambiguous states in node rows
generate_tip_node_matrix <- function(n_taxa = 50, n_tips = 25, n_traits = 50,
                                     prob_amb_in_nodes = 0.9, prop_ones_tips = 0.5,
                                     seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)
  if (n_tips > n_taxa) stop("n_tips must be <= n_taxa")
  n_nodes <- n_taxa - n_tips
  
  # row/col names
  tip_names  <- paste0("t", seq_len(n_tips))
  node_names <- paste0("n", seq_len(n_nodes))
  row_names  <- c(tip_names, node_names)
  col_names  <- paste0("c", seq_len(n_traits))
  
  # Tips: random 0/1 (characters)
  tips_mat <- matrix(sample(c("0","1"), n_tips * n_traits, replace = TRUE,
                            prob = c(1 - prop_ones_tips, prop_ones_tips)),
                     nrow = n_tips, ncol = n_traits)
  # Nodes: mostly 0/1 but with some "0/1" ambiguous entries
  nodes_mat <- matrix(nrow = n_nodes, ncol = n_traits)
  for (i in seq_len(n_nodes)) {
    for (j in seq_len(n_traits)) {
      if (runif(1) < prob_amb_in_nodes) {
        nodes_mat[i, j] <- "0/1"
      } else {
        nodes_mat[i, j] <- sample(c("0","1"), 1)
      }
    }
  }
  
  mat <- rbind(tips_mat, nodes_mat)
  rownames(mat) <- row_names
  colnames(mat) <- col_names
  mode(mat) <- "character"
  return(mat)
}

# Example
mat50 <- generate_tip_node_matrix(n_taxa = 50, n_tips = 25, n_traits = 10000, prob_amb_in_nodes = 0.1, seed = 42)


mat50_orig <- mat50

# create a second matrix where ambiguous entries are NA
mat50_na <- mat50_orig
mat50_na[grepl("/", mat50_na)] <- NA_character_


# all_na_rows <- apply(mat50_na, 1, function(x) all(is.na(x)))





uncertain_dist <- char.diff(mat50, method = "mord", by.col = FALSE)
na_dist <- char.diff(mat50_na, method = "mord", by.col = FALSE)


uncertain_ord <- cmdscale(uncertain_dist, k = ncol(uncertain_dist) -2, add = TRUE)$points
na_ord <- cmdscale(na_dist, k = ncol(na_dist) -2, add = TRUE)$points



dispRity(uncertain_ord, metric = c(sum, variances))$disparity

dispRity(na_ord, metric = c(sum, variances))$disparity


```
